'''shakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pachydermatously|pachydermatously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pachydermatously|pachydermatously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shakate|shakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shakatesher|shakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatesherĂ«m|shakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shakatero|shakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakateshĂ«|shakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakateshĂ«m|shakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishakatero|gokishakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakateshĂ«|gokishakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakateshĂ«m|gokishakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshakankerom|goshakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakankeshĂ«|goshakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakankeshĂ«m|goshakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshakankeya|goshakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shakaterom|shakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatemu|shakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shakateya|shakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishakaterom|gokishakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatemu|gokishakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishakateya|gokishakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shakakate|shakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shakakatesher|shakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakakatesherĂ«m|shakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shakakatero|shakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakakateshĂ«|shakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakakateshĂ«m|shakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishakakatero|gokishakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakakateshĂ«|gokishakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakakateshĂ«m|gokishakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshakakankerom|goshakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakakankeshĂ«|goshakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakakankeshĂ«m|goshakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshakakankeya|goshakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shakakaterom|shakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakakatemu|shakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shakakateya|shakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishakakaterom|gokishakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakakatemu|gokishakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishakakateya|gokishakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠte|shĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠtesher|shĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠtero|shĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠtero|gokishĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠkĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠtemu|shĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠkĂŠteya|shĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠterom|gokishĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠkĂŠteya|gokishĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafkafte|shafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafkaftesher|shafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafkaftesherĂ«m|shafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafkaftero|shafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafkafteshĂ«|shafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafkafteshĂ«m|shafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafkaftero|gokishafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafkafteshĂ«|gokishafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafkafteshĂ«m|gokishafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafkafnkerom|goshafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafkafnkeshĂ«|goshafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafkafnkeshĂ«m|goshafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafkafnkeya|goshafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafkafterom|shafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafkaftemu|shafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafkafteya|shafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafkafterom|gokishafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafkaftemu|gokishafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafkafteya|gokishafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
